Terminal.welcome: Welcome to AKASHI DEV. Type 'help' to see available commands.
Terminal.helpText:
Available commands:
  help         - Shows this help message
  projects     - Opens the Projects app
  about        - Opens the About Me app
  skills       - Opens the Skills app
  contact      - Opens the Contact app
  certificates - Opens Certificates
  experiments  - Opens the Lab
  experience   - Opens Experience
  settings     - Opens Settings
  browser      - Opens the Web Browser
  whoami       - Shows current user
  date         - Shows system date
  github       - Opens my GitHub profile in a new tab
  theme        - Changes system theme (Usage: theme dark / theme light)
  fetch cv     - Simulates downloading and opening my CV
  neofetch     - Shows AkashiOS system information
  echo [text]  - Prints text to the console
  sudo         - ?????
  clear        - Clears the terminal output
Terminal.notFound: Command not found: {command}. Type 'help' to see available commands.

About.title: About me - AKASHI DEV
About.subtitle: Software Engineer & UI/UX Designer
About.description: Hi, I'm Akashi, a passionate developer focused on creating premium user interfaces with interactive and fluid experiences. I combine the technical rigor of engineering with the aesthetic sensitivity of modern design to bring extraordinary web projects to life.
